headline: Boomers Are Quietly Loading Up on These Super-High-Yield Dividend Kings for Reliable Passive Income
summary: Some retirees are quietly bypassing Treasury yields and money market accounts by targeting a forgotten corner of the dividend world where payout streaks stretch back more than half a century, but the safety story on a few of these picks is far more complicated than the headline yields suggest.

headline: Dividend Harvesting Portfolio Week 281: $28,100 Allocated, $3,158.42 In Projected Dividends
summary: Dividend Harvesting Portfolio tops $40K with 43.6% ROI and 7.83% yield; dividend income hits $3,158.
